problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: If Reservoir computing with physical substrate is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Theoretical complexity proof with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
